demo.heading: See What
phones: Interactive venue map with live checkpoint tracking
Live leaderboard keeps players competing all day
Built-in merch store where rewards become real items

media.heading: How It Plays Out,
media.subheading: An interview from the floor of the Portugal Smart Cities Summit, plus photos and clips from live deployments.
media.quote: Treasure Hunt is a gamification of the conference itself. We hide treasures around the venue, and players find the spots and tap their phone to claim a reward. More than half the booths joined in, and it drives real interaction between attendees and the exhibition.
media.quoteContext: Filmed at the Portugal Smart Cities Summit, FIL Pavilhão 3
media.photo1Alt: Attendees holding Official Treasure Hunt flyers with tap-to-claim QR codes at the event booth
media.photo2Alt: Treasure Hunt staffer demoing the game to a crowd at the NOVA Cidade booth
media.photo3Alt: Event team celebrating together under the venue lights
media.clip2Alt: Hand tapping a phone on a Treasure Hunt tag

features.heading: Built for Organizers.
features.description: Treasure Hunt turns any event into a live adventure. Attendees earn points by exploring your space, completing challenges, and discovering hidden checkpoints. Points unlock real rewards at the built-in store.

items.title: Guide Foot Traffic
items.description: You decide where checkpoints go. Every checkpoint is a reason to walk across the venue, driving traffic to sponsors, booths, and underexplored areas.

items.title: Reward Real Participation
items.description: Attendees earn rewards for engaging, not just showing up. Points they can spend in the built-in merch store on exclusive items and sponsor rewards.

items.title: Zero Friction Setup
items.description: Place NFC tags or QR codes anywhere. Attendees sign in once and are playing in seconds. No app. No downloads. No friction.

items.title: Track Everything in Real Time
items.description: See which checkpoints are visited, which areas are underexplored, and who your most engaged attendees are. Live analytics for organizers.

howItWorks.heading: Five Steps.
howItWorks.callout: You place the checkpoints. You set the rewards. We handle everything else.
howItWorks.infraDescription: Behind every scan, every reward, and every leaderboard update is real infrastructure built for speed, transparency, and zero friction. Your attendees never see the complexity. They just play.

steps.title: Open and Play Instantly
steps.description: Attendees visit a URL on their phone and sign in with one tap. No app download, no account setup. They’re playing in a few seconds.

steps.title: Explore the Venue
steps.description: Checkpoints are placed where you want traffic. Attendees follow the map, discover hidden spots, and uncover rewards across your space.

steps.title: Scan to Earn
steps.description: One tap on an NFC tag or scan of a QR code. Instant reward, automatically tracked. Every interaction becomes a data point for you.

steps.title: Compete and Collaborate
steps.description: Live leaderboards fuel friendly competition. Social challenges and team missions keep energy high throughout the event.

steps.title: Spend Real Rewards
steps.description: Points unlock exclusive rewards and prizes. Attendees leave with something real to remember your event.

infraItems.title: Runs on Nova Cidade L3
infraItems.description: A dedicated Layer 3 blockchain network built for speed. Designed to support thousands of simultaneous players with no delays or failures, even at peak activity.

infraItems.title: Zero Cost to Participants
infraItems.description: A built-in paymaster covers all transaction fees. Attendees collect rewards, spend at the merch store, and climb leaderboards without ever paying a cent.

infraItems.title: One-Tap Sign-In
infraItems.description: No seed phrases, no wallet setup, no tech knowledge needed. Attendees sign in like any other app. We handle the smart account deployment and key management behind the scenes.

infraItems.title: Fully Transparent & Auditable
infraItems.description: Every reward minted, every checkpoint scanned, every merch purchase, all recorded and verifiable. Give sponsors and stakeholders engagement data they can trust.

useCases.heading: Built for
useCases.description: From 50-person meetups to 10,000-seat arenas. Treasure Hunt scales to your event and your goals.

items.title: Conferences & Summits
items.description: Turn passive attendees into active explorers. Drive traffic to sponsor booths, fill dead zones between sessions, and give organizers hard data on what worked.

items.title: Corporate Events
items.description: Gamify product launches, team offsites, and internal summits. Give every attendee a reason to explore the space and interact with every activation.

items.title: Universities & Campuses
items.description: Orientation weeks, open days, and campus tours that students actually enjoy. They explore, compete, and discover spaces they’d skip otherwise.

items.title: Festivals & Expos
items.description: Layer exploration across massive venues. Reward attendees for visiting stages, sponsor areas, and hidden experiences — and track it all in real time.

items.title: Brand Activations
items.description: Connect physical marketing to measurable results. Know exactly which touchpoints drove interaction, how long people stayed, and what they engaged with.

items.title: Hackathons
items.description: Keep builders moving between coding sessions. Reward participation at workshops, sponsor booths, and social areas with merch they actually want.

items.quote: Seriously!! The treasure hunt was a HUGE SUCCESS! You guys played a big role in creating the ETH Denver experience! Well done!
items.author: Nick

items.quote: My booth was tucked in a back corner, I barely had anyone stopping by. Then Treasure Hunt hid a checkpoint at my spot and suddenly people kept showing up. They’d scan the tag, see my custom kicks, and start buying. That one checkpoint completely turned my weekend around.
items.author: Custom Sneaker Vendor

items.quote: No app download, no complicated setup. Players were scanning checkpoints within 30 seconds of signing in. The merch store was a huge hit.
items.author: NOVA Blockchain Lab

items.question: How long does it take to set up?
items.answer: As fast as 48 hours. We handle the tech, you tell us where the checkpoints go and what rewards to offer.

items.question: Do attendees need to download an app?
items.answer: No. It runs entirely in the phone browser. One tap to sign in, playing in a few seconds.

items.question: Can we customize the branding?
items.answer: Yes. Pro and Enterprise packages include custom checkpoint design and reward names. The Enterprise package includes white-label branding.

items.question: What does the checkpoint setup look like?
items.answer: The design and setup of both QR codes and NFC tags is included in the respective packages. We handle everything so your team doesn't have to.

items.question: What data do organizers get?
items.answer: A real-time dashboard with checkpoint visits, engagement heatmaps, and leaderboard standings is available on all plans during the game activation. Enterprise adds a full post-event analytics report to share with sponsors and a multi-event dashboard to track and compare performance across the most significant events, enabling the identification of strengths, weaknesses, and what truly drove engagement.

items.question: Is there a minimum event size?
items.answer: Starter covers events up to 100 attendees. Pro scales up to 1,000, and Enterprise handles everything above that.
